Cook-App
  • Database
  • View page source

Database

The backend uses an SQLite database under backend/main/database.db (or test_database.db when TESTING is set). The Database helper in main.database handles creation and schema loading from database/schema.sql and test data from database/test_data.sql.

See backend/database/schema.sql for the table definitions.
